description: Controls how and when every leg in the portfolio enters the market. Divided into Execution Settings, Execution Mode, and Timing.

fields.label: Product
fields.description: Broker order product type. MIS = intraday (lower margin), NRML = carry-forward (full margin).

fields.label: Strategy Tag
fields.description: Links this portfolio to a Strategy defined in Strategies config. Required for live execution.

fields.label: If One or More Leg Fail
fields.description: KeepPlacedLegs = keep successful legs open. CancelPlacedLegs = roll back all legs on any failure.

fields.label: Portfolio Execution Mode
fields.description: Master trigger: Start time = enter at start, Manual = wait for external trigger, others = dynamic condition-based entry.

fields.label: Based On
fields.description: Reference point for dynamic entry target. None = absolute Entry Price, DayOpen/StartTime = captured reference + rounding + adjust.

fields.label: Entry Price
fields.visible_when: based_on == 'None' and execution_mode not in ['Start time', 'Manual']
fields.description: Absolute target level when Based On = None. System waits until premium/index reaches this price.

fields.label: Rounding Value
fields.description: Snaps captured ref_val to nearest grid. <1 = fractional threshold, >=1 = nearest multiple.

fields.label: Adjust Price
fields.description: Expression applied to rounded ref_val. E.g. '+10', '-15', '+5%'. Percentage uses 1-pct/100 formula.

fieldsets.note: These are execution-level timing fields (intraday windows). Backtest date range is in the separate Timing tab.

fields.label: Run On Days
fields.description: Which calendar days the portfolio is permitted to run. Custom reveals Mon-Sun checkboxes.

fields.label: Selected Days
fields.description: Individual day selection when Run On Days = Custom.

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: Earliest intraday time legs can enter. Each leg can override with its own start time.

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: Cutoff for new entries. Existing positions continue to be monitored for SL/TP.

fields.label: SqOff Time
fields.description: Intraday forced exit time. All remaining open positions are squared off.

fields.label: Start Day
fields.description: When to begin relative to expiry (for options scheduling).

fields.label: Start Day Offset
fields.description: Number of days offset for Start Day (e.g. 1 = one day before expiry).

fields.label: SqOff Day
fields.description: Days before expiry to squareoff (0 = on expiry day).

fields.label: If Holiday, Use Previous Day for Start / Next Day for SqOff, Else no Entry
